# Sermaraja V | Associate System Engineer, Cloud & Full Stack Developer

Official portfolio of Sermaraja V (Sermaraj Vairamani), Associate System Engineer at Devopstrio Ltd. Specialized in Azure/AWS Cloud Engineering, DevOps, Infrastructure Modernization, and Full Stack Web Development.

## Bio & Contact Info
- **Name**: Sermaraja V (also known as Sermaraj Vairamani)
- **Role**: Associate System Engineer
- **Company**: Devopstrio Ltd.
- **Location**: Kovilpatti, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Email**: sermarajav.offcl@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://sermaraj-dev-portfolio.vercel.app
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/sermaraja
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/sermaraja

## Key Credentials & Certifications
- **Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104)**: Expertise in managing Azure identities, governance, storage, compute, and virtual networks.
- **HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate**: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles, state management, and HCL syntax.
- **Red Hat Certified System Administrator (RHCSA)**: Linux system administration, storage management, security, and user access.
- **DevOps Engineering Foundations**: Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery, container orchestration (Kubernetes), and automated testing.
- **Enterprise Cloud Security & Monitoring Specialization**: Monitoring hybrid architectures with Azure Monitor, Grafana, and Log Analytics.

## Technical Skills
- **Cloud Providers**: Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services (AWS)
- **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)**: Terraform
- **Operating Systems**: Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL), Ubuntu, Windows Server
- **DevOps & Automation**: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, PowerShell/Bash scripting
- **Web Development**: Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
- **Database & Backend**: MongoDB, SQL, Node.js API development

## Professional Experience
### Associate System Engineer at Devopstrio Ltd. (July 2025 - Present)
- Supported an enterprise Azure migration project by assisting with infrastructure analysis, migration planning, and technical documentation across multiple environments.
- Worked on infrastructure modernization, virtualization, and deployment automation.
- Conducted internal technical training workshops on cloud migration tools, PowerShell scripting, and system monitoring.

## Awards & Recognition
- **Collaboration Champion Award (2025–26)**: The highest internal recognition at Devopstrio Ltd. for exceptional teamwork, peer support, technical guidance, and active training sessions.

## Projects
- **Enterprise Azure Migration & Infrastructure Modernization**: Assistance with migration planning, network security configurations, and tenant setups.
- **Infrastructure Monitoring & Observability Dashboard**: Implementing Grafana, Prometheus, and Azure Monitor for real-time cluster metrics.
